title: Navia's Survival +
description: A modpack that aims to give you a nice experience for your 2 week Minecraft phase.
body:
![Logo of the modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/970a2d98ae7563e25e80a500ce2a9f3434155287.png)
**A modpack that tries to add a LOT of improvements to the game while keeping a nice and enjoyable experience**

Some changes:
- Nice animations for mobs and players.
- New structures, mobs, bosses and mobs.
- Free cosmetics system (thanks to [Cosmetica](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetica)).
- Friends system and a world host system (thanks to [World Host](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host)).
- A fresh GUI (based on [Juxtopposed design](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_Dm9_lUV3uA)).
